name: Full-Stack Development with GenAI Honours Program

issues.Content: Build Job-Ready Full Stack Applications with Java, React, Spring Boot, and Generative AI Integration Skills.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Add: "Become a Full Stack Developer with day-one job-ready skills - from SQL and Java to React, Spring Boot, and LLM integration.
Outcome Driven. Practitioner Designed"
Update to: '30+ Projects' (8 Course-End Projects + 6 Capstone Projects)

issues.Gap / Issue: Per skill calculation rules (10 learning sprints + 5 CEP/assignment sprints = 15 sprints; 4 sprints/week), Course 1 should span Sprints 1–15 → Weeks 1–4. Page shows Weeks 1–3.
issues.Fix Suggested: Update to: 'Weeks 1–4'

issues.Gap / Issue: Per skill calculation (15 sprints × 4 hours/sprint), Course 1 should be 60 hours, not 48.
issues.Fix Suggested: Update to: '60 Hours'

issues.Content: 1) SQL Querying & Database Design Fundamentals — Learn to write SQL queries to retrieve and manipulate data, design databases using ER diagrams and normalization techniques, and explore advanced concepts like triggers, stored procedures, and JSON columns. 2) Business-Focused Data Extraction Skills — Gain essential SQL expertise to efficiently extract and analyze relevant data aligned with business needs.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Replace with:

• SQL Querying & Data Operations
Build strong hands-on skills to retrieve, analyze, and manipulate data using SQL, enabling you to extract meaningful insights and work effectively with real-world datasets.

• Database Design, Integrity & Advanced Capabilities
Design structured databases using ER diagrams and define robust schemas while ensuring data consistency, and extend functionality through automation and support for modern data formats.
Change label from 'Module Activity' to 'Activity'

issues.Content: Hands-on Project to Choose: Fitness Tracker Database, Movie Streaming Platform Database, Online Bookstore Database
issues.Fix Suggested: Hands-on Project to Choose:Hospital Patient Management System, Movie Streaming Platform Database, Online Bookstore Database, Recipe Manager Database, Student Attendance & Performance Tracker, Fitness Tracker Database
Update to: 'Weeks 4–8'

issues.Gap / Issue: Per skill calculation (15 sprints × 4 hours/sprint), Course 2 should be 60 hours, not 64.
issues.Fix Suggested: Update to: '60 Hours'

issues.Content: 1) Core Java Programming & Problem Solving — Implement logic using Core Java fundamentals and understand how real-world objects map to programs while identifying and developing object-oriented solutions. 2) Object-Oriented Application Development — Build a strong Java foundation and apply object-oriented concepts to design and develop well-structured, scalable applications.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Replace with : 
1) Core Java Programming & Problem Solving
Apply Core Java fundamentals—variables, control flow, arrays, strings, recursion, and searching/sorting—to build efficient, program logic.

2)Object-Oriented Application Development
Apply object-oriented concepts and exception handling to design well-structured Java applications.
Change label from 'Module Activity' to 'Activity'

issues.Gap / Issue: Course title in description is 'Data Structures and Algorithms Essentials'; the word 'Essentials' is missing on page.
issues.Fix Suggested: Rename to: 'Data Structures and Algorithms Essentials'
Update to: 'Weeks 8–11'
Update to: '52 Hours'

issues.Content: 1) Data Structures & Algorithm Fundamentals — Understand and implement core data structures (arrays, stacks, queues, trees) and algorithms (sorting, searching, recursion). 2) Efficient Problem Solving & Performance Optimization — Enhance your problem-solving skills and optimize performance using efficient data structures and logical approaches.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Replace with :
• Data Structures Implementation
Implement core data structures such as arrays, stacks, queues, linked lists, trees, and hash tables along with searching and sorting algorithms.

• Algorithm Analysis and Optimization
Analyse time and space complexity and apply recursion and suitable data structures to solve performance-critical problems.
Change label from 'Module Activity' to 'Activity'

issues.Gap / Issue: Typo: 'Hand-on' should be 'Hands-on' (other course blocks use 'Hands-on').

issues.Content: 1) Modern Java Features & Functional Programming — Compare user-defined objects using Comparator and Comparable, and optimize code with Lambda expressions and Functional Interfaces. 2) Stream API & Efficient Data Processing — Utilize the Stream API for efficient data processing and write concise, modern Java code using functional programming techniques.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Replace with 
Testing and Collections
Write unit tests and manage data using collections and generics for organized, reliable programs.

Modern Java Practices

Rename to: 'Building Responsive and Interactive Web Pages'
Update to: '60 Hours'

issues.Content: 1) Responsive Web Development Fundamentals — Develop responsive web pages adaptable to multiple devices, structuring and styling content using HTML5 and CSS3. 2) UI/UX Design & Prototyping — Design effective web layouts using Figma based on core UI/UX principles. 3) Interactive & Framework-Based Development — Utilize Bootstrap for responsive design and JavaScript to create dynamic, interactive web experiences.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Replace with:
• Responsive Web Design & User Experience
Create visually appealing and responsive web interfaces by structuring content effectively and applying modern styling practices aligned with UI/UX principles.
• Interactive Web Development & API Integration
Build dynamic, interactive web applications by handling user interactions and seamlessly connecting front-end interfaces with backend services through APIs.
Change label from 'Module Activity' to 'Activity'

issues.Content: BookBack – Local Book Exchange Website, Cookify – Recipe Sharing Website, SkillSetu – Local Skills for Hire Website, TableTap – Online table-booking site
issues.Fix Suggested: Hands-on Project to Choose: BookBack – Local Book Exchange Platform, Cookify – Recipe Sharing Web Platform, SkillSetu – Local Skills for Hire Platform, TableTap – Online Table Booking for Dining, TastyCart – Simple Food Ordering Platform, Town Trek – Local Guide Web Platform
Rename to "Building Single Page Applications Using React"
Update to: 'Weeks 18–21'
Update to: '60 Hours'

issues.Content: 1) React-Based Single Page Application Development — Build dynamic Single Page Applications using React with reusable components and declarative rendering. 2) State Management & API Integration — Manage application state using hooks, handle events efficiently, and integrate APIs seamlessly. 3) Scalable UI Development with TypeScript & Modern Tools — Apply TypeScript for scalable code and use styled-components and Material UI to build responsive, production-ready interfaces.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Replace with below:
• Component-Based UI Development
Build reusable and maintainable user interfaces using JSX, components, and props.

• State, Interactivity & Data Handling
Create dynamic apps by managing state, handling interactions, and integrating APIs with React hooks.

• Scalable, Styled & Tested Apps
Improve reliability with TypeScript, design responsive UIs using Material UI, and ensure quality through testing using Jest and RTL.
Change label from 'Module Activity' to 'Activity'
Update to: 'Weeks 21–24'
Update to: '40 Hours'

issues.Content: 1) Advanced React Application Development — Build complex, form-driven SPAs with React, including dynamic routing and secure role-based authentication. 2) Scalable State Management & Optimization — Use reducers and context for efficient state management and develop optimized, production-ready applications.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Replace with below content:
• Forms & Navigation in React Applications
Build and validate complex forms and enable seamless user journeys through efficient form handling and in-app routing.

• Authentication, State Management & Performance
Implement secure access control and manage application state effectively using Context API while optimizing performance for production-ready apps.
Change label from 'Module Activity' to 'Activity'

issues.Content: Building Backend Application Using Spring Boot
issues.Fix Suggested: Rename to: 'Build Back-end Application using Spring Boot'
Update to: '60 Hours'

issues.Content: 1) Spring Boot & RESTful API Development — Develop backend functionalities using Spring Boot by designing and testing RESTful APIs, integrating NoSQL databases, and handling exceptions effectively. 2) Scalable & Secure Backend Engineering — Gain hands-on experience in building scalable, secure backend services with real-world applicability.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Replace with :
• API Development and Testing
Design, build, and test RESTful APIs using Spring Boot with relational and NoSQL databases, including documentation and performance validation.

• Scalability and Security
Enhance and secure services with pagination, filtering, microservices architecture, and authentication mechanisms.
Change label from 'Module Activity' to 'Activity'

issues.Content: Integrate Web Applications with LLM APIs
issues.Fix Suggested: Rename to: 'Build simple AI-embedded Applications using Spring AI'
Update to: 'Week 28'
Update to: '12 Hours'

issues.Content: 1) LLM Integration & Backend API Development — Build backend services that connect with LLMs, expose them as REST APIs, and integrate seamlessly with the front end. 2) AI-Powered Full-Stack Application Development — Gain the ability to integrate Large Language Models into full-stack applications for intelligent, real-world solutions.
issues.Fix Suggested:
Replace with :
• LLM Application Development
Build LLM-powered applications using Spring AI with text generation, prompt design, and structured outputs.

• Context-Aware AI Systems
Enhance applications with conversational memory and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for context-driven experiences.

issues.Gap / Issue: Description's outcomes span 10 courses; page distils to 6 bullets and omits explicit outcomes for Data Structures & Algorithms (problem-solving / Big-O), Advanced Java (Streams/Lambdas, JUnit testing), Forms & Routing in React, and Capstone delivery.
